title: Functional Fletching
description: Functional Fletching is a Minecraft datapack that adds a new use to Fletching Tables.
body:
Functional Fletching is a Minecraft 1.21 datapack that adds a new use to Fletching Tables.


You can now craft arrows easier and more efficiently, and you can even craft new types of arrows!
Mix and match different tips, shafts, and fletchings to create fun and exciting arrows.


Craft the new fletching table by putting a vanilla fletching table into the crafting grid.
Villagers will NOT use the functional fletching table as a workstation to be a fletcher.


Tips:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Cosmetic:
- Flint
- Iron Nugget
- Gold Nugget
- Copper Nugget
- Carrot
- All Dyes
- Cod
- Resin Clump
- Emerald
- Ghast Tear

Functional:
- Amethyst Shard - Pierces enemies
- TNT - Explodes on impact
- Ender Pearl - Teleports shooter on impact
- Chorus Fruit - Teleports enemies on impact
- Sponge - Spawns sponge on impact
- Spider Eye - Poisons enemies on impact
- Coal - Lights up area on impact
- Copper Ingot - Summons lightning on impact
- Wither Rose - Gives enemies the wither effect on impact
- Magma Cream - Lights enemies on fire on impact
- Wind Charge - Creates a burst of wind on impact
- Slime Ball - Makes the arrow bounce up to five times
- Diamond - Gives the arrow much more damage
- Brick - Gives the arrow 5x gravity
- Nether Quartz - Makes the arrow break into fragments on impact
- Eye of Ender - Seeks enemies
- Clay Ball - Deals no damage


</details>

Shafts:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Cosmetic:
- Stick
- Bone
- Blaze Rod - Creates fire particles in the air
- Bamboo
- Breeze Rod - Creates wind particles in the air

Functional:
- End Rod - Removes gravity from arrow
- Echo Shard - Teleports arrow up to 50 blocks away

</details>

Fletchings:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Cosmetic:
- Feather
- Kelp
- String
- Ink Sac - Creates ink particles when fired
- Glow Ink Sac - Creates glow ink particles when fired
- Cobweb

Functional:
- Phantom Membrane - Removes gravity from arrow
- Dragon Breath - Doubles arrow speed after firing
- Prismarine Shard - Makes the arrow travel normally through water

</details>
